name: SQLite Browser
compose:
name: slashnode-sqlitebrowser
services:
  app:
    image: linuxserver/sqlitebrowser:3.13.1
    container_name: sqlitebrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      TZ: Etc/CET
    volumes:
      - app_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8887:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-config:
    name: slashnode-sqlitebrowser_app_data-config
